# Q 

2 

LEATHERSHIELD EVO

## Interior / coating

### World’s First coating for automotive leather - now re-invented.

Q² LeatherShield EVO is a ceramic coating formulated to protect modern leather interiors. It forms an invisible barrier that reduces wear, color transfer, and contamination while maintaining the natural look and feel of the leather.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/productmain-1700x1645-evo-leathershield-50-box-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Advanced leather protection

Q² LeatherShield EVO safeguards leather from daily wear, dye transfer, and dirt without changing softness or appearance. It makes cleaning easier, reduces scratching, and helps keep the interior looking fresh longer.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons4.svg)

ANTI-STAIN PROTECTION 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons9.svg)

DIRT REPELLENT 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons79.svg)

PREVENTS UV DAMAGE 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons81.svg)

WATER REPELLENT 

what makes

Q2 LEATHERSHIELD EVO so special? 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/ch2a2697-683x1024.jpg)

Designed for modern coated leather used in most vehicles today.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/ch2a2704-683x1024.jpg)

Creates an invisible protective layer without changing colour, finish or feel.

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2leathershield.webp)

CAPACITIES 

50 ML / 100 ML

BOX CONTAINS 

Q² LEATHERSHIELD EVO / APPLICATOR SET / MANUAL 

Durability 

Real World Lifespan

18months / 30K km

PH Tolerance

pH 4-9

Consumption

30-40ml/car

[Instruction](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/2023interiorcoatingsmanual.pdf)

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

LEATHERSHIELD EVO

01
Clean the leather thoroughly and remove dirt and residue. 

02
Ensure the surface is dry before application. 

03
Apply a generous amount of product using the included Q²M Coating Applicator. Make sure the surface is cool and free of dust. 

04
Spread evenly, working one element at a time. 

05
Let the coating cure for at least 6 hours before using the surface. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
Can Q² LeatherShield EVO be used on all leather types? 

It is designed for modern coated automotive leather. It is not suitable for aniline or open pore leather.

02
Will it change the look or feel of the leather? 

No. It keeps the original finish and softness.

03
Does it protect against dye transfer from clothing? 

Yes. It significantly reduces colour transfer and staining getting into the leather itself.

04
How long does the protection last? 

Up to 18 months, depending on use and maintenance.

05
How should protected leather be cleaned? 

Use a mild leather cleaner and a soft microfibre cloth.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/360000250097-Q-LeatherShield)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
